headline: Sentiment down 80% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Optimism trending down 10% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 128 quotes, heavily skewed toward strong intensity (105 strong quotes) - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance.

• Despite the high volume, frustration scores dropped significantly from yesterday's peak of 82.6, suggesting some cooling off from an even more intense period.

• Both fears and optimism remain well below average, with fears taking an especially sharp dive from yesterday.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
